text:
EL○ is the 13th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 13th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by .

Title

The title is pronounced "elen", the Japanese pronunciation for Eren. This is because the circle symbol can be articulated as "en".

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn.
